synth-review-coherence.name: synth-review-coherence
synth-review-coherence.description: Execute review-driven architecture cleanup in dependency-safe order with measurable verification.
action_steps: Unify shared contracts and parser/type names before structural extraction.
Split oversized lightbox and timeline adapters into capability-specific modules with stable APIs.
Refactor complete-task orchestration into explicit pipeline stages and isolate side-effects.
Quarantine migration shims into compat boundaries and remove legacy exports from active public surfaces.
Add focused tests around task-details, timeline write paths, and mapping status propagation.

smart-t1-review.name: smart-t1-review
smart-t1-review.description: High-leverage T1 review fixes to raise coherence/design scores before broad structural churn

smart-runtime-contract-pass.name: smart-runtime-contract-pass
smart-runtime-contract-pass.description: Risk-first runtime seam stabilization and contract coherence pass after synthesis
action_steps: Unify reconnect orchestration and remove duplicate retry schedulers.
Introduce explicit Supabase/runtime boundaries and stop direct facade imports in orchestration layers.
Collapse remaining lightbox translation layers into one boundary model with stable selectors/actions.
Fix join-clips stale async/listener lifecycle issues with request guards and deterministic cleanup.
Replace cache-subscription rerender side channel with query-driven selectors and focused state.
Backfill seam tests for reconnect races, join-clips hydration cancellation, and lightbox render triggers.

synth-lightbox-contracts.name: synth-lightbox-contracts
synth-lightbox-contracts.description: Reduce lightbox indirection and consolidate state/workflow contracts
action_steps: Collapse pass-through lightbox adapters into one boundary mapper per media mode
Consolidate workflow controls into one behavior owner with layout wrappers
Replace global CSS open-state coupling with explicit state contract

synth-runtime-init-coupling.name: synth-runtime-init-coupling
synth-runtime-init-coupling.description: Eliminate hidden runtime/bootstrap coupling around Supabase and globals
action_steps: Unify Supabase readiness into one explicit runtime source
Replace throw-on-access singleton patterns with injected accessors
Consolidate debug globals behind typed registry with teardown

synth-contract-boundaries.name: synth-contract-boundaries
synth-contract-boundaries.description: Tighten domain/transport boundaries, migration aliases, and contract tests
action_steps: Normalize domain mappers to domain key contracts only
Constrain legacy aliases to DTO boundary and schedule deprecation
Backfill behavior-level tests for contract and error-path invariants
